  n_sync_worker -->|"Fetch Business Profile data (rating/reviews/hours/website)"| n_google_maps
  n_sync_worker -->|"Register/enrich/close listings + record prospect contacts via the ACL (/external/graphql)"| n_api

  n_bam -->|"Export traces/metrics/logs (OTLP)"| n_otel_collector

## Domain — bounded contexts → aggregates → read models

Each aggregate links to the `View_*` read models its emitted events project into.

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  subgraph g_restaurant["restaurant"]
    a_RestaurantAccount["RestaurantAccount"]
    a_Restaurant["Restaurant"]
    a_Prospect["Prospect"]
  end
  subgraph g_catalog["catalog"]
    a_Catalog["Catalog"]
  end
  subgraph g_order["order"]
    a_Cart["Cart"]
    a_Order["Order"]
    a_PlaceOrderProcess["PlaceOrderProcess"]
    a_RefundProcess["RefundProcess"]
  end
  subgraph g_customer["customer"]
    a_Customer["Customer"]
    a_CartBindingProcess["CartBindingProcess"]
  end
  v_View_RestaurantAccount[("View_RestaurantAccount")]
  v_View_Restaurant[("View_Restaurant")]
  v_View_ProspectionPipeline[("View_ProspectionPipeline")]
  v_View_Catalog[("View_Catalog")]
  v_View_Customer[("View_Customer")]
  v_View_Cart[("View_Cart")]
  v_View_OrderTracking[("View_OrderTracking")]
  a_RestaurantAccount --> v_View_RestaurantAccount
  a_RestaurantAccount --> v_View_Restaurant
  a_Restaurant --> v_View_Restaurant
  a_Restaurant --> v_View_ProspectionPipeline
  a_Prospect --> v_View_ProspectionPipeline
  a_Catalog --> v_View_Catalog
  a_Customer --> v_View_Customer
  a_Customer --> v_View_Cart
  a_Cart --> v_View_Cart
  a_Order --> v_View_OrderTracking
  a_Order --> v_View_Customer
  a_PlaceOrderProcess --> v_View_OrderTracking
  a_PlaceOrderProcess --> v_View_Cart
```

## Saga sequences — message → emitted events, in order

Each process manager (saga) as a time-ordered sequence: the command/event it receives and the
events it emits in response (derived from `actors.yaml`).

### PlaceOrderProcess

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant C as Caller / inbound
  participant P as PlaceOrderProcess
  participant S as Event store
  C->>P: PlaceOrder (command)
  P->>S: PaymentIntentCreated
  C->>P: PaymentCaptured (event)
  P->>S: OrderPlaced
  P->>S: CartCheckedOut
  C->>P: PaymentFailed (event)
  Note over P: Abort the saga  no OrderPlaced  the cart stays OPEN.
```

### RefundProcess

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant C as Caller / inbound
  participant P as RefundProcess
  participant S as Event store
  C->>P: OrderRejectedByRestaurant (event)
  Note over P: Request refund from Stripe.
  C->>P: OrderCancelledByCustomer (event)
  Note over P: Request refund from Stripe.
  C->>P: OrderCancelledByRestaurant (event)
  Note over P: Request refund from Stripe.
  C->>P: RefundRequested (event)
  Note over P: Customer-initiated refund request  validate eligibility, the
  C->>P: PaymentRefunded (event)
  Note over P: Record the settled refund fact (reported by Stripe).
```

### CartBindingProcess

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant C as Caller / inbound
  participant P as CartBindingProcess
  participant S as Event store
  C->>P: CustomerIdentified (event)
  Note over P: Bind customerId onto the visitor's OPEN carts (View_Cart pro
```
